purpose: The head-function return-shape arm (the board's named-unobserved 'returning something other than a numba typed list of strings'): head_first_grounding_bare registers silently (the registrar validates nothing) but returns a bare grounding STRING, and reason() dies at the head-resolution seam with TypeError("can't unbox a <class 'str'> as a <class 'numba.typed.typedlist.List'>") — the pinned _call_head_function objmode block unboxes the registrand result to types.ListType(types.unicode_type) (interpretation.py:2332). The raise is the reason step's banked outcome; get_time after it compares the state the raise left behind.
provenance: docs/surface.md fn:add_head_function (return-contract arm, named unobserved until session 29); interpretation.py:2316-2338 at the pin; reference fn harness/reference_fns.py head_first_grounding_bare; screened live 2026-07-12 (screen_pin_arms.py head-str, 2 fresh pin processes, message byte-stable)
